title: CA1 interneuron working-point failure -- a neuron's-eye view

slides.topic: PING fire under excitation-only; silence is network-level
CCK Basket is the dominant GABA clamp
Why CCK over-fires: D1 model infidelity + D2 fixed point
Depolarization block: source blocks, point model can't -> user_m3
CCK dis-inhibited: GABA into CCK under-transferred
Contact allocation: real bug but not the wall
RESOLVED: fundamental point-reduction limit (native fires, reduced doesn't)
The fix: user_m4 dendritic Na regeneration
